actionCalls.description: Calls the AgentListReportTypes Apex action to query available report types from the Analytics REST API.
actionCalls.name: List_Report_Types
actionCalls.label: List Report Types

Flow.interviewLabel: WSM - ALF - Agent: List Report Types {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: WSM - ALF - Agent: List Report Types

variables.description: Error details when success is false. Common causes: session timeout (try again), insufficient permissions (user needs access to Reports), or Analytics API unavailable.
variables.name: errorMessage

variables.description: Optional keyword to filter report types. Only types whose label or API name contain this text are returned. Case-insensitive. Example: "Opportunity" returns OpportunityList, OpportunityWithContact, etc. Leave blank to return all available report types.
variables.name: filterKeyword

variables.description: Maximum number of report types to return. Defaults to 50 if not provided. Maximum allowed value is 200. Use lower values when you only need a few types to keep response concise.
variables.name: maxResults

variables.description: JSON array of available report types. Each element has: "apiName" (the value to pass as reportType when creating a report), "label" (human-readable name), "description" (what data the type covers). Parse this to find the right report type for your needs.
variables.name: reportTypesJson

variables.description: True if report types were retrieved successfully, false if an error occurred. Always check this before using reportTypesJson.
variables.name: success

variables.description: Number of report types returned. Use this to confirm results were found before parsing reportTypesJson.
variables.name: typeCount
